items.deck: The US government is finally inching closer to loosening its strict regulations over marijuana, but whether that will be enough to take pot mainstream like booze and tobacco remains a hazy question.

items.title: See the ugly moment footy star goes too far with 'crybaby' sledge as he tries to bring back awful family memory for rival
items.deck: There have been calls for the Fremantle Dockers star to face disciplinary action over his taunt during Saturday's match.

items.title: Thousands of Britons suffered life-changing fractures after Wes Streeting ­broke his promise on new clinics, charity warns
items.deck: The failure to roll out services that check patients for osteoporosis, known as fracture liaison services (FLS), has resulted in 17,000 preventable fractures.

items.title: New York City Is Spending $81,000 Per Year On Each Homeless Person
items.deck: New York City Is Spending $81,000 Per Year On Each Homeless Person New York City spent about $368 million last year on services for people living on the streets, which equals roughly $81,000 per unsheltered person, according to the NY Post.

items.title: Trump Is Finally Eyeing an Exit From Iran. But Will He Take It?
items.deck: President Trump says he is considering “winding down” operations in Iran.

items.title: I'm not a church regular but I do believe, says William as he defends his 'quiet faith'
items.deck: The Prince of Wales has revealed his commitment to the Church of England and his 'quiet faith' in a move aimed at clarifying his role as future king and head of the Church.

items.title: How Iran's ruthless enforcers use rape to crush dissent: Brutal sex attacks on victims as young as 12 used to strike fear into protesters, rights groups reveal amid fury over sickening nurse gang rape
items.deck: Known for their brutality, the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) slaughtered thousands of protesters who dared to take to the streets in anti-government protests in January.

items.title: Gisele Pelicot tells how she thought she was dying from a brain tumor... then she discovered the horrific truth of her husband's abuse
items.deck: She thought increasingly regular bouts of memory loss could only mean one thing: that she was dying of a brain tumor - just as her mother had.

items.title: Corporate leaders flee the result of left-wing agendas they supported
items.deck: For years, radical socialist politicians insisted that corporate America needed more regulation, higher taxes and a greater role in advancing political causes.

items.title: Prisoners serving up to four years in jail would be given the vote if Green Party came to power... as critics claim Zack Polanski is trying to reform voting system in his favour
items.deck: The hard-Left parliamentarians will force a showdown in Parliament over the controversial policy.
